Our Story

Where Every Guest
is the Guest of Honor

Nestled on McFarland Boulevard in the heart of Northport, El Gran Patrón Mexican Grill brings bold, soulful Mexican flavor to West Alabama. We're a fun, family-friendly destination where the food is always fresh, the margaritas are always cold, and every guest is treated like royalty.

From our legendary Steak Patrón to the crowd-favorite Patron Pollo Loco, every dish is crafted with care. Whether you're dining in on the patio, catching the game at the bar, or picking up for the family — you're always welcome here.

  • Dine-In · Outdoor Patio · Curbside Pickup · Delivery Available
  • Full Bar · Margaritas · Beer · Wine · Cocktails · Tequila
  • Happy Hour Mon–Fri 4:00–7:00 PM
  • Kids' Menu (10 & Under) · Sports Viewing
  • Law Enforcement 50% Off · Military 10% Off (Dine-In, Uniform Required)

Weekly Specials

Something Special Every Day

Monday
Margarita Monday
House margaritas at a special price — frozen or on the rocks, traditional or flavored. Start your week the Patrón way.
All Day
Tuesday
Taco Tuesday
Mexican street tacos at a deal — steak, chicken, carnitas, chorizo, al pastor, shrimp, fish, or ribeye on corn tortillas with cilantro and onion.
All Day
Wednesday
Wine & Dine Wednesday
Enjoy a glass of house wine — Sangria, Chardonnay, Pinot Grigio, White Zinfandel, or Merlot — with any entrée.
Dine-In Only
Thursday
Quesabirria Thursday
Our Quesabirria Tacos (3) — shredded beef birria with melted cheese on corn tortillas, topped with cilantro and onion, served with consomé and rice.
While Supplies Last
Friday & Saturday
Weekend Fiesta
We're open late until 10:30 PM with the full bar firing on all cylinders. Bring the crew, grab a Patrón Pitcher, and make a night of it.
Open Until 10:30 PM
Saturday & Sunday
Weekend Soups
Our authentic Menudo and Caldo de Res are only available on weekends. A true Mexican tradition, available only while supplies last.
Weekends Only
🍺 Happy Hour · Mon–Fri 4:00–7:00 PM · Imported Beer $3.50 · Domestic Beer $3.00 · Large Draft $4.75 · Med Margarita $6.00

* Specials subject to change. Call (205) 391-4555 to confirm.
